name: teamsherrard-realtor
description: Team Sherrard's plug-and-play AI systems for real estate agents.

plugins.name: realtor-ai-brain
plugins.description: PLUGIN 1 — install first. The Realtor AI Brain: one shared brain (the agent's identity + memory) that powers every other system. Run 'Set up my Brain' once, and every tool already knows the agent.

plugins.name: realtor-jarvis
plugins.description: PLUGIN 2 — the AI Admin (The Agent Leverage OS). Books the calendar, drafts email in the agent's voice, sorts the inbox, remembers every client, briefs them at 7am. Requires Plugin 1 (the Brain) set up first.
